_comment: Species: Earth Fire Dragon (地火龙) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Earth Fire Dragon

canonical.appearance: Serpentine dragon 30 m, scales molten-earth, breath is liquid fire, lives in magma
canonical.size: 30 m adult, 60000 jin; ancient 100 m, millions of jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary apex of volcanic regions; sleeps in magma for centuries; soul-extracted by Wang Lin
canonical.habitat: Earth Fire veins, volcanic regions, magma chambers
canonical.diet: magma minerals, fire-attribute herbs, earth-fire essence
canonical.relationships: Soul extracted by Wang Lin (canon event); rival of flame dragon
canonical.bloodline: Earth-Fire-Dragon lineage; earth+fire true dragon bloodline (diluted)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: earth_fire_dragon — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
